name: @tank/auth-patterns
description: Auth patterns for any stack. JWT, OAuth2 (PKCE, Client Credentials, Device Code), sessions, RBAC/ABAC/ReBAC, OpenID Connect, social login, MFA (TOTP, WebAuthn/passkeys), and auth security (XSS/CSRF, token storage). Triggers: JWT, OAuth2, PKCE, session management, RBAC, ABAC, OIDC, social login, MFA, TOTP, WebAuthn, passkeys, refresh token, access token, implement auth, cookie security, HttpOnly, SameSite, credential stuffing, account linking, permission system.
